description: Fix UI inconsistencies: sidebar-customize-section.tsx is out of sync with the main sidebar, and plugin page toggle buttons lack accessibility attributes
steps: In components/tenant/settings/sidebar-customize-section.tsx: Remove the '/tenant/integrations' entry from the Developer section in the CATALOG array. The main sidebar (components/tenant/layout/sidebar.tsx) no longer lists Integrations, so the customize section must match. The comment in the file says 'Mirrors NAV_SECTIONS in components/tenant/layout/sidebar.tsx -- keep in sync.'

In app/tenant/plugins/page.tsx: Add proper accessibility attributes to the toggle button for enabling/disabling plugins. Currently the togglePlugin button has no role='switch' or aria-checked. Add role='switch' and aria-checked={plugin.status === 'active'} to match the pattern used in sidebar-customize-section.tsx. Also add aria-label attributes to the expand/collapse button (aria-label='Show details') and delete button (aria-label='Delete plugin').
In app/tenant/plugins/page.tsx: Add aria-label='Test connection' to the test connection button in the expanded view, and aria-label='Copy webhook URL' to the copy button.
acceptance_criteria: CATALOG in sidebar-customize-section.tsx no longer has '/tenant/integrations' entry
Toggle buttons in plugin page have role='switch' and aria-checked attributes
All icon-only buttons in plugin page have aria-label attributes
npx tsc --noEmit still passes with zero errors
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit and confirm zero errors
Grep for '/tenant/integrations' in sidebar-customize-section.tsx - should not appear
Grep for 'role="switch"' in app/tenant/plugins/page.tsx - should appear
